title: Masterplast Oriental Rub, Muscle Relief & Comfort, Ready to Use 70G, Pack of 3
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Masterplast Oriental Rub is an effective herbal pain relief. The unique herbal blend has a soothing , warming sensation on muscles providing welcome relief from aches and pains
NON-GREASY: Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin
SOOTHING: A warming massage rub for muscles that produces a soothing sensation. Ideal remedy for pulled muscles from running or a gym session
READY TO USE: Keep handy in sports and travel bags to sooth muscles as soon as discomfort starts
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 70g tube
description: Product Description Masterplast Oriental Rub is an effective herbal pain relief. The unique herbal blend has a soothing, warming sensation on muscles providing welcome relief from aches and pains. Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin. A warming massage rub for muscles that produces a soothing sensation. Ideal remedy for pulled muscles from running or a gym session. Tube 40g Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Paraffinum Liquidum, Cetyl Alcohol, Stearic Acid, Propylene Glycol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Polysorbate 60, Glyceryl Stearate, Sorbitan Stearate, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Menthol, Disodium Pyrophosphate, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Sodium Phosphate, BHA, Methyl Salicylate, Limonene Directions Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin Safety Warning [INF] Keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin. Apply gently to affected parts of the skin. Legal Disclaimer Masterplast Oriental Rub Warming Massaging Muscle Rub With Soothing Sensation 70g Ideal for all types of muscular twists, sprains and bruises.
